nodes.name: 人类活动扰动
nodes.summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 乌干达
nodes.summary: 乌干达是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联249种鸟类，包括南非鸭、Elgon francolin、Shelley's francolin等249种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 肯尼亚
nodes.summary: 肯尼亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联308种鸟类，包括索马里鸵鸟、南非鸭、Western crested guinea fowl等308种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 马拉维
nodes.summary: 马拉维是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联140种鸟类，包括南非鸭、Whyte's francolin、日本鵪鶉等140种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Mafinga Hills
nodes.summary: Mafinga Hills是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Verreaux's eagle，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 刚果民主共和国
nodes.summary: 刚果民主共和国是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联274种鸟类，包括南非鸭、Black guinea fowl、剛果孔雀等274种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Verreaux's eagle
nodes.summary: Verreaux's eagle（Verreaux's eagle，学名 Aquila verreauxii），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联7个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括峡谷峭壁、稀树草原，主要威胁包括人类活动扰动。

nodes.name: 峡谷峭壁
nodes.summary: 大型猛禽和食腐鸟偏好的高崖栖息环境。

nodes.name: 尼卡高原
nodes.summary: 尼卡高原是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Verreaux's eagle、Ludwig's double-collared sunbird，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 坦桑尼亚
nodes.summary: 坦桑尼亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联307种鸟类，包括南非鸭、Eastern crested guinea fowl、Shelley's francolin等307种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Published by Christopher Helm, London. possibly some mountains in northeastern Uganda, Kenya, easternmost Democratic Republic of the Congo and possibly Tanzania. Southeastern Africa is the heart of the Verreaux's eagle range: they are found in most mountain ranges in Malawi but for the Nyika Plateau, the Mafinga Hills and the Lulwe Hills,Dowsett-Lemaire, F

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It lives in kopjes, which are dry, rocky environments in anything from rocky hills to high mountains amongst cliffs, gorges and inselbergs often surrounded by savanna, thornbush and sub-desert. It is often found in dry areas with less than of average annual rainfall

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It lives in kopjes, which are dry, rocky environments in anything from rocky hills to high mountains amongst cliffs, gorges and inselbergs often surrounded by savanna, thornbush and sub-desert. It is often found in dry areas with less than of average annual rainfall

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: In Walter Sisulu National Botanical Garden in South Africa, despite an appreciable decline in rock hyrax populations, breeding data revealed few changes in the incubation period, nestling period and post-fledging dispersal period in two known pairs of the eagles. At this same site, despite it being one of the most popular nature areas in metropolitan Johannesburg, high levels of human activity have had no apparent adverse effect on the eagles' breeding behaviour (by contrast, when exposed to similar levels of disturbance, golden eagles have been shown to temporarily abandon their nests).Simmons, R., Rodrigues, L., Woodcock, L., Steyn, P
